/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ModelViewer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModelViewer.dir/src/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModelViewer.dir/src/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModelViewer.dir/src/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ModelViewer.dir/src/OBJLoader.cpp.o -o ModelViewer -F/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX13.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libGLEW.2.3.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglm.dylib -framework OpenGL
